inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Child's age in months (for percentile interpretation, not used in BMI formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Child's age in months (for percentile interpretation, not used in BMI formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çocuğun ay cinsinden yaşı (persentil yorumu için, BMI formülünde kullanılmaz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Kindes in Monaten (für Perzentil-Interpretation, nicht in BMI-Formel verwendet).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge de l'enfant en mois (pour interprétation percentile, non utilisé dans la formule IMC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del niño en meses (para interpretación de percentiles, no se usa en la fórmula del IMC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عمر الطفل بالأشهر (لتفسير النسبة المئوية، لا يُستخدم في معادلة مؤشر كتلة الجسم).

inputs.label: Sex
inputs.businessContext: Biological sex (0 = female, 1 = male) for growth chart percentile lookup.

businessContext_i18n.en: Biological sex (0 = female, 1 = male) for growth chart percentile lookup.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biyolojik cinsiyet (0 = kadın, 1 = erkek) büyüme çizelgesi persentil sorgulaması için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Biologisches Geschlecht (0 = weiblich, 1 = männlich) für Wachstumsdiagramm-Perzentil-Nachschlage.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sexe biologique (0 = féminin, 1 = masculin) pour la recherche de percentile sur la courbe de croissance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Sexo biológico (0 = femenino, 1 = masculino) para la consulta de percentiles en tablas de crecimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجنس البيولوجي (0 = أنثى، 1 = ذكر) للبحث عن النسبة المئوية في مخطط النمو.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
